title: ShutUpF2
description:
It just removes the "saved screenshot" message.

I don't know why this mod wasn't made before (for newer versions) so I did it.

If you want to request this mod for any version please comment in the Comments tab.
body:
It just removes the "saved screenshot" message.

I don't know why this mod wasn't made before (for newer versions) so I did it.


Why did I make this mod?:
Have you ever tanken multiple screenshots in minecraft but noticed how annoying are theh multiple chat messages appearing on your screen, blocking the intended good shot view of your newly developed artist carreer?! Well now you can!

Why not just disable chat?
If you disabble chat you at the same time are not permitting yourself to chat with friends, or for some mod related mechanic that needs the chat (e.g. MCA Reborn)
